Cleanup Old Articles

Delete articles older than the specified number of days from the database.

days
Test TLS Impersonation
Sentiment Analysis
Checking service… Start service: cd sentiment_service && python service.py

Finds articles for a ticker already in your DB and scores them with the local FinBERT + VADER + Dictionary ensemble. No API key required.

Runs unanalyzed articles through the local FinBERT + VADER + Dictionary ensemble. No API key required.

Scores unanalyzed articles using DS440's rule-based lexicon engine (64 bullish / 31 bearish financial phrases + emojis). Instant — no FinBERT model load required.

Scans articles for stock ticker symbols using DS440's three-tier regex engine (cashtags → parenthesized → bare uppercase), validated against ~10k NYSE/NASDAQ symbols. Updates the ticker field in the database.

Loading…
